offer_name: Self-hosted ZMath Shield / Q Call secure-comms license

standard_matrix_chat.description: Standard Matrix-compatible messaging stays free on CallChat.

hosted_callchat_shield.user_experience: Users deliberately protect a file or vault note locally with a passphrase and optional pattern file, then attach only the authenticated ZME1 container.
hosted_callchat_shield.public_boundary: The working MVP uses reviewable standard Web Crypto primitives. Premium policy, managed recovery, and private ZMath research remain separate.

self_hosted_zmath_shield_license.scope: One approved self-hosted CallChat-compatible deployment on one public server IP with unlimited users
includes: owner-controlled MatrixRTC and Q Call posture

security_boundary: No plaintext files in this public status endpoint.
No Shield passwords, pattern material, derived keys, policy bearer secrets, or private ZMath source are published here.
The hosted MVP performs encryption locally in the browser; private research and server credentials remain outside the public tree.
